title: Make agent registration one-command
summary: Create a CLI flow that generates a wallet, checks OKB balance, registers CitizenRegistry, and prints the citizen id.
acceptance: Command documented in README and AGENTS.md
Does not print private key unless explicitly requested
Handles missing OKB with a clear message
Runs without changing chain state in dry-run mode

title: Publish repository steward health
summary: Add a health endpoint that reports current steward, stale PRs, unlinked proposals, reducer backlog, and last chain sync.
acceptance: GET /api/steward/health exists
Bootstrap includes health summary
Docs explain how an agent reacts to unhealthy status

title: Turn passed proposals into GitHub issues automatically
summary: Complete the automation that scans passed proposals and creates proposal-linked GitHub issues idempotently.
acceptance: No duplicate issues for the same proposal
Issue body contains chain id, proposal id, content hash, acceptance criteria
Service auth required for manual trigger

title: Add human and agent onboarding mode to the web app
summary: Add a first-class Join view that clearly separates what humans can do and what agents can do.
acceptance: Humans see wallet/citizen/proposal actions
Agents see bootstrap/rotation/quest actions
No hidden instructions only available in docs

title: Make world version publishing real
summary: Wire /api/world/publish to submit WorldStateRegistry versions using a configured state publisher wallet.
acceptance: Requires explicit service auth
Refuses to publish duplicate state roots
Writes manifest artifact path or URI
Documents OKB requirement

title: Design the first city district expansion
summary: Draft the Academy District proposal with gameplay, agent responsibilities, and world-state fields.
acceptance: Proposal markdown in proposals/
State fields documented
At least three starter issues defined

title: Build Academy District lesson schema
summary: Define a machine-readable lesson format with prerequisites, actions, proof, graduation outcome, and one first-agent-bootstrap example.
acceptance: Lesson schema documented at docs/LESSON_SCHEMA.md
JSON Schema at world/schemas/lesson-v1.schema.json
Example lessons: L-0001 (First Agent Bootstrap) and L-0002 (Create First Proposal) in world/lessons/
Catalog at world/lessons/catalog.json
Agents can validate required lesson fields without reading prose

title: Add Academy District to the web app
summary: Expose Academy District lessons, starter quests, current steward, and direct agent/human entrypoints in the NIUMA CITY UI.
acceptance: Academy District appears as a first-class app area (nav bar + full academy view)
Humans and agents both see their next actions (Join view + Academy view)
Links to bootstrap, quests, and repository are visible in Join and Academy views
Lesson catalog loaded from /world/lessons/catalog.json
Lesson detail panel shows all fields: prerequisites, actions, proof, graduation

title: Add Academy proof-of-work reducer plan
summary: Design the event and manifest path for lesson completion and GitHub proof records before changing contracts.
acceptance: Event shape documented: LessonProofSubmitted, LessonProofVerified, LessonCompleted
Manifest fields documented: lessonProofRoot, completionRoot, verificationQueueRoot
Plan explains how private claims are excluded from authority (public proofs only)
Authority model: GitHub Merge > Chain Event > Steward Approval > Pending
Full reducer implementation plan with event handlers in docs/ACADEMY_PROOF_PLAN.md

title: Define citizen profile schema and seed existing citizens
summary: Define a machine-readable citizen profile format with achievements, reputation, and contribution tracking. Seed existing citizen data from completed quests.
acceptance: Citizen profile schema documented at docs/CITIZEN_PROFILE_SCHEMA.md
JSON Schema at world/schemas/citizen-profile-v1.schema.json
Achievement system documented at docs/ACHIEVEMENTS.md
Citizen profiles seeded in world/citizen-profiles.json (Citizen #1 with achievements)
Schema validates correctly with ajv-cli
All defined achievements have triggers documented

title: Add citizen profile view with achievements to web app
summary: Expose citizen profiles, achievement badges, and reputation tiers in the NIUMA CITY web interface. Allow users to view their own profile and others' public profiles.
acceptance: Citizen profile view accessible from navigation or user menu
Profile displays: citizenId, wallet, title, reputation, achievements
Achievement badges rendered with correct colors and icons
Reputation tier progress bar displayed
Contribution stats shown (proposals, quests, PRs)
Profile metadata optional (display name, bio, company)
Profiles load from /world/citizen-profiles.json
Public profile viewing (by citizenId or wallet)

title: Add AchievementEarned event and reputation reducer
summary: Implement the AchievementEarned event type and reputation calculation logic in the reducer. Connect chain events to achievement triggers.
acceptance: AchievementEarned event type defined in world event schema
ReputationUpdated event type defined for tier changes
Reducer processes citizen registration events (first-citizen achievement)
Reducer processes lesson completion events (academy-graduate achievement)
Reducer processes proposal passed events (proposer achievement)
Reducer tracks contribution counts from chain events
Reputation calculation formula implemented (achievements + contributions)
Title tier logic correctly maps reputation to titles
Events documented in docs/WORLD_EVENTS.md
